arts.ttl: Report: Trent Alexander-Arnold handed surprise England role against Finland
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is expected to be given the left-back position when England face Finland in the UEFA Nations League on Sunday. Alexander-Arnold's position in the England squad has been a hot topic as of late, with former manager Gareth Southgate choosing to station him in midfield during Euro 2024.

arts.ttl: England team news vs Finland – Pickford dropped, Kane returns
arts.sum: England have named their team to face Finland in the UEFA Nations League on Sunday. Lee Carsley has made a statement with first-choice goalkeeper Jordan Pickford dropped to the bench following an unconvincing performance in the 2-1 defeat to Greece last week. Crystal Palace goalkeeper Dean Henderson replaces Pickford and makes his first start […] The post England team news vs Finland – Pickford dropped, Kane returns first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: England team news: Harry Kane starts as Lee Carsley makes six changes for Finland clash
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley makes six changes to his starting lineup for their UEFA Nations League clash with Finland.

arts.ttl: Man Utd put Harry Maguire up for sale for just €12m
arts.sum: Despite paying €87 million to sign Maguire from Leicester five years ago, United are ready to accept offers of just €12m for the defender so desperate are they to sell him. That is according to the Daily Mirror, who report that United want to sell Maguire as his contract expires at the end of the season and because he is surplus to requirements.

arts.ttl: England starting XI vs Finland as Lee Carsley DROPS Jordan Pickford after Greece blunders
arts.sum: England's interim head coach Lee Carsley has made changes to his team following their 2-1 loss to Greece in midweek with captain Harry Kane among the players to come back in

arts.ttl: Lee Carsley confirms decision on permanent England manager job
arts.sum: Carsley, the Under-21 manager, stepped up to the senior team in an interim role following Gareth Southgate's departure, but was quickly tipped to take on a permanent position after an impressive first run of fixtures in September. It was then reported that Carsley had privately made it clear he did not want the role full-time, and now the interim boss has confirmed he did not apply to become England's next full-time manager.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to play completely new position for England after midfield experiment
arts.sum: England boss Lee Carsley is set to ring the changes for Sunday evening's match with Finland and it's thought his plans involve shifting Trent Alexander-Arnold to left-back

arts.ttl: Finland vs England LIVE! Nations League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.athr: Matt Verri,Dan Kilpatrick and Dom Smith
arts.sum: England look to bounce back in Helsinki after Greece humiliation

arts.ttl: Cole Palmer tipped for Barcelona transfer as Chelsea told to expect difficult conversation
arts.sum: Cole Palmer is in his second season at Stamford Bridge since his switch from Manchester City, and although many questioned the move at the time the 22-year-old has proven to be a revelation

arts.ttl: Finland v England LIVE: Nations League team news and line-ups as Lee Carsley faces Ollie Watkins dilemma
arts.sum: The Three Lions look to bounce back from a disappointing defeat to Greece at Wembley last time out
